page.metaDescription: Full Stack Developer specialized in Node.js, React, and TypeScript. Experience building scalable web applications, APIs, microservices, Docker deployments, and IoT solutions.

personalInfo.description:
Full Stack Developer specialized in Node.js, React, and TypeScript, focused on building scalable web applications, APIs, and production-ready systems.
I have experience designing backend architectures, microservices, process automation, and service integrations, while also developing modern frontend interfaces.
I work with SQL and NoSQL databases depending on the use case, and deploy applications using Docker on VPS environments with QA and production workflows.
I also develop IoT solutions combining software, infrastructure, and device communication.
personalInfo.shortDescription: Full Stack Developer with experience in Node.js, React, APIs, microservices, Docker, and production systems.
personalInfo.specialization: Node.js, TypeScript, React, Next.js, REST APIs, SQL/NoSQL, Docker, microservices, VPS infrastructure.

hobbies.name: Music
hobbies.description: Self-taught musician, specialized in bass and guitar. Actively participates in his community by playing at events and services.

hobbies.name: Sports
hobbies.description: Enthusiast of soccer and ice hockey, regularly practicing these disciplines as part of a healthy lifestyle.

hobbies.name: Learning
hobbies.description: Passionate about technology, with an interest in electronics and computer building. Always looking for new technical skills.

experiences.description: Full Stack application development with focus on backend, system architecture, frontend integration, and infrastructure.
responsibilities: Developed robust REST and GraphQL APIs using Node.js (Express, NestJS).
Implemented business logic, microservices, and interactive third-party integrations.
Built modular and responsive frontend interfaces using React, Next.js, and Microfrontends (Module Federation).
Designed, modeled, and optimized relational and NoSQL databases.
Implemented caching strategies with Redis to optimize response times and minimize database overhead.
Managed Cloud VPS infrastructure, configuring Nginx as a reverse proxy and automating deployments via Docker and GitLab CI/CD.

projects.name: Hubeet
projects.description: SaaS platform focused on business process automation and service integration through APIs and chatbots.
responsibilities: Design and development of robust and secure RESTful and GraphQL APIs using Node.js with Express and NestJS, including authentication, authorization, and error handling.
Modeling and management of relational databases, query optimization, and migrations.
Implementation of complex business logic for chatbot automation, management, and integration.
Implementation of business logic, validations, and backend data processing to ensure system integrity and functionality.
Development and maintenance of independent microservices that communicate through REST APIs.
Implementation of caching systems with Redis to improve response times and reduce database load.
VPS infrastructure administration.
Configuration and implementation of CI/CD pipelines with Docker and GitLab CI/CD to automate deployments.
Configuration and use of Nginx as a reverse proxy to expose services, route traffic, and improve security.

projects.name: Clara
projects.description: Clara is a SaaS platform (Company OS) that enables startups and funds to incorporate companies, manage equity (cap table, ESOP), automate legal documents, and access global banking services from a single platform.
responsibilities: Development of frontend modules using React with micro-frontend architecture and Module Federation.
Design and implementation of responsive and accessible interfaces.
Implementation and optimization of functionalities for uploading, editing, and managing documents and templates.
Performance improvements and re-render reduction to optimize load times and user experience.
Integration of the frontend with GraphQL APIs for dynamic data handling.
Collaborative work under agile methodologies, using Git for version control and tools such as Jira and Confluence for task management and technical documentation.

projects.name: Elevator Control
projects.description: Real-time IoT system for monitoring elevators and machine rooms, designed with modular architecture and secure communication between devices.
responsibilities: Real-time communication through secure MQTT (mqtts) using EMQX as broker
Device authentication using JWT for secure system access
OTA update implementation and configuration management via NVS
Modular architecture in PlatformIO for WiFi, MQTT, and security management
Backend development in NestJS for authentication, device management, and data processing
Dashboard development in Next.js for real-time monitoring
Deployment in Docker containers with Nginx as reverse proxy
features: Advanced management of organizations and elevators by administrators.
Intuitive real-time data visualization for end users.

projects.name: Educational Organizer
projects.description: Web platform for course, student, and attendance management, designed for multiple organizations and production environments.
responsibilities: Backend development in Node.js using Express and Sequelize with MySQL database.
Implementation of role-based access control and secure authentication with JWT.
Implementation of file storage.
Backend deployment on a VPS with Docker, Nginx as reverse proxy, and DNS configuration with Cloudflare.
Frontend development in Next.js, deployed on Vercel.
QA and production environment separation, configuration management via environment variables.
Architecture prepared for multiple organizations (multi-tenant)
features: Registration and management of organizations, courses, and students.
Tool for teachers to take attendance through unique links and secure credentials.

projects.name: Web Portfolio
projects.description: Digital portfolio designed to showcase skills, experience, and projects.
responsibilities: Frontend development using React and Next.js with Tailwind CSS for a clean, responsive, and accessible interface.
Implementation of static pages generated at build time with Next.js, retrieving dynamic data from MongoDB.
Use of Next.js API Routes to handle integrated backend logic, such as contact form submission.
Performance and SEO optimization to improve load times and search engine visibility.
Continuous deployment setup on Vercel.
Source code management with Git to maintain an organized and controlled development process.

educations.description: University degree focused on developing technical and theoretical skills in information systems, including programming, mathematics, physics, and operating systems.
Intensive training in web development, acquiring skills in technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, and MySQL for building web applications.
